rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for deployment bindings and assignments.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting AGREE annex content.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level AGREE bindings.
Avoid inserting AGREE clauses that reference undefined AADL properties.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE clauses referencing AADL timing properties as variables without explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees
